# FFERR_EFFECTTYPEMISMATCH | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_EFFECTTYPEMISMATCH ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_effecttypemismatch)

-  FFERR_EFFECTTYPEMISMATCH 

Global Variable# FFERR_EFFECTTYPEMISMATCH

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_EFFECTTYPEMISMATCH: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_effecttypemismatch#Discussion)

The IOForceFededbackLib driver has received an effect modification request whose basic type does not match the defined effect type for the given effect.
